role: Leader of the National Front; Foreign Minister in provisional government (1979)
bio: Leader of the [National Front of Iran](/orgs/national-front-iran). Served briefly as Foreign Minister in [Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan)'s provisional government in 1979, before being succeeded by [Ebrahim Yazdi](/people/ebrahim-yazdi). Went into exile and died in 1995.
editorial_notes: National Front leader. Died 1995 in exile.
